Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 2 0 0}You look a bit pale... Are you doing all right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}Don't overwork yourself, okay? Maybe you should rest in the nurse's office before you leave.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}I was actually about to head to the faculty office. Would you like me to walk you downstairs?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}I... want to spend as much time with you as I can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 7 0 0}Okay, let's head down to the faculty office together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 9 0 0}It'll be kind of embarrassing to walk side by side at school, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 10 0 0}Oh... Well, be careful on your way home, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 11 0 0}Sounds good. People often get sick when the seasons change, so maybe you're coming down with something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 12 0 0}Okay, let's head over to the faculty office together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 13 0 0}Do you have plans already? Well, just make sure you go home soon and get some rest.[n]{f 1 1}
